top_signals.title: Hetts: Ignore PEs, Watch Earnings
top_signals.summary: AI stocks may be stealing the spotlight, but Janus Henderson's Adam Hetts says investors are missing the bigger story. He joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why earnings, and not valuations, are driving markets, why sticky inflation isn't a dealbreaker, and why the rally is expanding well beyond Big Tech. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Goldsky closes Agnico deal to become sole owner of Swedish project
top_signals.summary: The gold explorer announced in January its intention to buy a 55% interest in the Barsele property from Agnico.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: World’s largest EV battery repurposing megafactory opens in British Columbia
top_signals.summary: Moment Energy announced the project six weeks ago.
